name: Dill Jones
abstract: Dillwyn Owen Paton "Dill" Jones (19 August 1923 – 22 June 1984), was a Welsh jazz stride pianist.

works.t: Right This Way: I'll Be Seeing You

concerts.label: Jazz: The Personal Dimension: JPJ Quartet
New York Jazz Repertory Company: The Music of Bix Beiderbecke
Newport Jazz Festival: New York Jazz Repertory Company

about_quotes.speaker: Carmen Leggio
about_quotes.evidence: Then there was a change of piano players. Dave McKenna, John Bunch, Dill Jones... And so not too many changes in bass players, but the piano players there was a lot of changes.
about_quotes.doc_title: Carmen Leggio interviewed by Monk Rowe, Tarrytown, New York, October 31, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Vince Giordano
about_quotes.evidence: We had ... Dill Jones ... And many, many musicians ... So you know, we tried to put as many of these great musicians to work
about_quotes.doc_title: Vince Giordano interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 11, 2007
